# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio egress unrestricted and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-apis-via-proxy
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-apis-via-proxy
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /path/to/api
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.example.com
            port:
              number: 443

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: istio-egress-unrestricted
spec:
  hosts:
    - *.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---
